ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "price" REAL /* Closing price for the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Open price for the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price for the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price for the given date */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the data was obtained */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality or reliability of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  "instrument_sector" TEXT /* Sector classification of the instrument */,
  "instrument_sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector classification of the instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, compliance officer) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role within the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts for security purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell, short) */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument associated with the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold that triggered the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, dismissed) */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_notifications_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Identified trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the analysis (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "analysis_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level in the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_analysis_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of market event (e.g., earnings report, economic news) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the market (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "event_relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the event to the instrument or market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument associated with the alert */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert is triggered */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, triggered) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action or event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "historical_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical price */,
  "historical_price" REAL /* Raw historical price */,
  "adjusted_price" REAL /* Adjusted price accounting for splits and dividends */,
  "history_type" TEXT /* Type of historical price data (e.g., adjusted, unadjusted) */,
  "history_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
